reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A great place to rest for a night halfway through your trip to Bariloche

reviews.comment:
Llegamos el 29 a la noche .Muy buena atención, limpio,nada de ruido y excelente trato de la gente del ACA que lo atiende.para hacer un alto en el camino.Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
We arrived on the 29th at night. Very good service, clean, no noise, and excellent treatment from the ACA staff. A great place to stop along the way. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHamJ1djBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bien cuidada. Lugar para descansar un buen rato y estirar las piernas en un viaje largo. Buenos precios y buena atencion del personal.

(Translated by Google)
Very well maintained. A great place to rest and stretch your legs on a long trip. Good prices and friendly staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHbGEzZGdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada para alcanzar la ruta 33 viajando desde la Patagonia. Todos los servicios necesarios en una estación de muchos años perteneciente a la red de ACA.
No opino sobre el motel, nunca me alojé.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for those traveling from Patagonia to Route 33. All the necessary services are available at this long-established station belonging to the ACA network.
I can't comment on the motel; I've never stayed there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcFpuSFpREAE
